data.body: CHECKPOINT: Both emit-review-result.sh calls added to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md. (1) Pass-path after 'Review passed' with --pass-fail=passed --revision-cycles=0 and tier/overlay args. (2) Resolution-path after re-review passes with --revision-cycles=REVIEW_PASS_NUM --resolution-code-changes/defenses and tier-final computed from RE_REVIEW_DEEP_FULL. All 3 acceptance criteria verified.
